name: ecc-dependency-graph-tools
description: ECC 依赖关系图谱工具(仅限本目录内部使用,不影响仓库根目录 package.json / npm test)

scripts.generate:all: npm run generate:rules && npm run generate:skills && npm run generate:agents && npm run generate:hooks && npm run generate:graph
scripts.refresh: npm run generate:all && npm run render
